mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_import_batch ( batch_id, original_filename, status, storage_dir, markdown_path, total_count, supported_count, unsupported_count, error_count, warning_count, imported_count, error_report_json ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{originalFilename}, #{status}, #{storageDir}, #{markdownPath}, #{totalCount}, #{supportedCount}, #{unsupportedCount}, #{errorCount}, #{warningCount}, #{importedCount}, #{errorReportJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_id, original_filename, status, storage_dir, markdown_path, total_count, supported_count, unsupported_count, error_count, warning_count, imported_count, error_report_json, imported_at, canceled_at FROM question_import_batch WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} LIMIT 1
